settings.speaker: Spika
settings.ttlPrompt: Je, akaunti inapaswa kufutwa baada ya siku ngapi za kutotumika?
settings.sqQuestion1: Jina la kipenzi chako cha kwanza lilikuwa nani?
settings.sqQuestion3: Ni filamu gani uliipenda zaidi ya utotoni?
settings.sqSetupDesc: Ukisahau nenosiri lako, unaweza kurejesha ufikiaji kwa kujibu maswali 3. Unaweza kutumia maswali yako mwenyewe au yale ya msingi.
settings.sqFillAll: Tafadhali jaza maswali na majibu yote

settings.pwIncorrectDesc: Tunapendekeza usasishe nenosiri lako ukiwa umeingia, ili usipoteze ufikiaji.
settings.clearCacheConfirm:
Je, ungependa kufuta akiba ya maudhui na data ya muda?

Vifunguo na mipangilio ya usimbaji fiche HAITAFUTWA.
settings.sessionTooYoungForPwChange:
Kipindi lazima kifanyike kwa angalau siku 7 ili kubadilisha nenosiri.

Muda uliosalia: siku {daysLeft}.
settings.waitDaysWarning: Siku 7 bado hazijapita. Tafadhali subiri siku {daysLeft} zaidi.
settings.geoDeniedMac:
Ufikiaji wa eneo la eneo umekataliwa.

1. macOS: Mipangilio ya Mfumo → Faragha → Huduma za Mahali → wezesha kwa kivinjari
2. Kivinjari: bofya ikoni ya kufunga kwenye upau wa anwani → Mahali → Ruhusu
3. Pakia upya ukurasa
settings.geoDeniedOther:
Ufikiaji wa eneo la eneo umekataliwa.

Bofya ikoni ya kufunga kwenye upau wa anwani → Mahali → Ruhusu, kisha upakie upya ukurasa

panic.callSettingsNote: Kumbuka: Hali za kulazimisha TCP na Relay zinaweza kuongeza ucheleweshaji lakini hutoa faragha ya juu. Kufunika trafiki kunaongeza pedi ya nasibu kwenye vikao vya SDP kuzuia uchambuzi wa metadata ya muunganisho.
panic.desc: Data yote kwenye nodi hii itafutwa milele. Hatua hii haiwezi kutenduliwa.
panic.warningBody:
Unakaribia kuharibu kabisa data yote.
Kitendo hiki hakiwezi kutenduliwa.
panic.allTracesRemoved: Ufuatiliaji wote umeondolewa. Kikao hiki kimekwisha.

privacy.autoKeySyncHint: Funguo mpya ya chumba inapopokelewa — sambaza otomatiki kwa vifaa vyako vyote (E2E iliyosimbwa)
privacy.backupHint: Simba funguo zote na neno la siri na uhifadhi kwenye seva. Ukibadilisha kifaa — rejesha na neno moja.
privacy.crossSignHint: Thibitisha vifaa vipya otomatiki kupitia saini ya HMAC (ulinzi dhidi ya ubadilishaji)
privacy.federatedHint: Sambaza vipande vya hifadhi rudufu vilivyosimbwa kwenye nodi za shirikisho (mpango wa Shamir). Hata seva ikipotea — urejesho kupitia wenzako.
privacy.historySyncHint: Nakala iliyosimbwa ya ujumbe inapatikana kwenye vifaa vyote. Seva inaona kelele tu
privacy.ktHint: Kumbukumbu ya nyongeza-peke tu ya mabadiliko yote ya funguo za umma na mnyororo wa heshi (Merkle). Seva inasaini kila ingizo — ulaghai hugunduliwa wakati wa ukaguzi.
privacy.linkDeviceHint: Hamisha funguo kwenye kifaa kipya kupitia msimbo wa tarakimu 6. Funguo zimesimbwa na ECIES — seva haiwezi kuzisoma.
privacy.ssssHint: Gawanya ufunguo mkuu katika sehemu N kwa kutumia mpango wa Shamir. Sehemu yoyote M itarejesha ufunguo. Kila sehemu imesimbwa kwa mwasiliano maalum wa kuaminika (ECIES). Seva inaona blobs zilizosimbwa tu.
privacy.title: Faragha

settings_profile.profileIconOver: Ikoni inaonyeshwa juu ya mandhari ya wasifu

botConstructor.title: Bot Constructor
botConstructor.subtitle: Build your bot visually — no code needed
botConstructor.welcomeMessage: Welcome message when user starts the bot...
botConstructor.defaultWelcome: Welcome! I am your bot. Use /help to see commands.
botConstructor.docsCommand: Responds when a user sends a specific command (e.g. /help, /start). You can add conversation steps to create multi-step dialogs.
botConstructor.docsMessage: Responds when a user message matches a pattern. Uses regex — e.g. "hello|hi" matches both words. Case-insensitive.
botConstructor.docsWelcome: The first message users see when they start the bot with /start. Every bot should have one.
botConstructor.docsScheduled: Sends a message automatically on a schedule. Great for daily reminders, weekly digests, or periodic announcements.
botConstructor.docsCondition: Branches the bot logic. Check a variable or user input and respond differently based on the result.
botConstructor.docsRandom: Bot picks one response randomly from the list. Perfect for jokes, tips, greetings, or varied responses.
botConstructor.docsApi: Makes an HTTP request to an external API and uses the response in the bot message. Use {data.field} to reference response fields.
botConstructor.docsAdminNotify: Sends a notification to the room admin when triggered. Useful for alerts, new user notifications, or moderation.
botConstructor.docsConversationsDesc: Add steps to a Command block to create interactive dialogs. Each step asks a question, waits for the user answer, and saves it to a variable. Use variables in the final response with {variableName}.
botConstructor.docsVariablesDesc: Use curly braces {variable} in response text to insert dynamic values. State variables persist across messages.
botConstructor.docsBuiltinVars: Built-in variables available in every response:
botConstructor.docsFormattingDesc: You can use HTML-like formatting in responses:
botConstructor.docsTip1: Start with a Welcome block — it is the first thing users see
botConstructor.docsTip2: Add a /help command that lists all available commands
botConstructor.docsTip3: Use conversation steps for registration, surveys, or data collection
botConstructor.docsTip4: Combine Condition blocks with variables for smart branching
botConstructor.docsTip5: Test your bot by talking to it in a room after deploying
